artifacts.summary: Discovery found an official UBD news page saying UBD had a Policy & Guidelines on Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) book, but no direct public copy of that policy was found. A UBD-hosted AJSTD journal policies page contains explicit AI-assisted writing rules, so claims are scoped to the journal policy rather than generalized to all UBD teaching or student conduct.

artifacts.title: Universiti Brunei Darussalam AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official UBD discovery found a 2023 UBD news page stating that UBD had a Policy & Guidelines on Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) book for teaching and learning, but no public direct copy of the book was found. A UBD-hosted AJSTD journal policies page provides explicit AI-assisted writing rules; those claims are scoped to the journal policy and should not be broadened to all UBD coursework, research, or student conduct.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The public GenAI policy book itself was not located; the UBD-wide claims rely only on the official news page's description.
AJSTD claims are journal publication-policy claims and should not be treated as UBD-wide teaching, learning, or assessment rules.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
